full_text:
Wang Ling
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Lingwas born in Wudu. Local leader who joined Jiang Xu’s plot against Ma Chao. Wang Ling was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
